examples: The chiral HMPA analogues were prepared in high yield by nucleophilic substitution between the chiral secondary amine and phosphoryl chloride.
The problem for now is that Church's entire lab is tuned to the wrong chiral setting.
Early Earth seems to have been covered in a soup of organic molecules with no chiral preference.
Fermentation is one obvious starting point for making chiral enantiomers, since it is a biological process and its products are therefore likely to be single-handed.
Moreover, if there are lots of chiral centres in a molecule, and each matters, the yield of the version with the right combination can be minuscule.
